title: REITs: Real estate investment trusts (REITs) are required to distribute a...
summary: Evaluate the REIT requirement to distribute at least 90% of taxable income.
prompt: Real estate investment trusts (REITs) are required to distribute a significant portion of their annual profits to shareholders.
solution: REITs must distribute at least 90% of their taxable income to maintain their tax-exempt status. This requirement makes them an attractive investment for those seeking income.
